entries.definition:
h–ṭ–ṭ to take down, to reduce, alleviation, reduction, relief,
حِطَّة ḥiṭṭatun, classified by philologists under this root, is variously
described as being of Hebrew, Nabatean, Syriac or of unknown
origin. Of this root, حِطَّة ḥiṭṭatun occurs once in the Qurʾan.

حِطَّة ḥiṭṭatun [n./v. n.] forgiveness, putting off [of sins],

219
